title: Industry Analyst Relations at Fall IDF 2005 — Peter Kastner Personalized Schedule
author: Liz Ryon (Intel SAS-Industry Analyst Relations Group)
abstract: Intel Analyst Relations personalized schedule prepared by Liz Ryon for Peter Kastner (then at Vericours, Inc., Westport MA) for Fall IDF 2005 at Moscone West, San Francisco, August 23-25. Documents Kastner's access to Intel senior leadership (Otellini keynote, Maloney mobility keynote, Louis Burns digital health, Pat Gelsinger digital enterprise, Justin Rattner R&D, Mooly Eden Napa mega-briefing) and press/analyst-only Yonah architectural briefing. Preserved as employer-record artifact of Kastner's Vericours-era analyst relationship with Intel.
importance_rationale: Represents concrete evidence of Kastner's top-tier industry analyst status — he received a personalized multi-day schedule with direct access to Intel's most senior technical and business leadership at a flagship industry event.
relevance_rationale: Schedule itself is ephemeral; its lasting value is archival/biographical as documentation of Kastner's analyst practice in 2005.
prescience_rationale: Schedule artifact contains no forward-looking claims.
